pages.title: Horned Huntsman
pages.text: Leonard is the demonic being who is rumored to have taught a cadre of German witches their trade, and often presided over their sabbats.

pages.title: Summoning Shade of Leonard
pages.text: A coven skilled with the $(l:brewing/introduction/anointing_paste)Witches' Cauldron$(/l) can summon a Shade of the Demon by using the appropriate $(l:brewing/effects/summon_leonard)Brew$(/l). Once summoned, the Shade of Leonard will not be hostile, but won't leave without being forcefully removed, which is by no means an easy task.

pages.title: Special Effects
pages.text: Leonard will significantly increase the range of spells cast from a $(item)Witch's Cauldron$() (removing the dimensional restriction of such castings). He will also increase the risk of side effects.

pages.title: Fighting Leonard
pages.text: Leonard is a Demon so powerful it does not perceive any physical being as a treat. When it's shade is summoned, it is not hostile, but if hit will respond accordingly. Leonard is a very skilled brewer and will use its arsenal of weapons in combat.

Leonard might apply $(item)Death Coil$() potion effect: it has no side effects, but once it expires, the victim dies, unless the Shade has been defeated.$(br)It may also apply $(item)Heavy$() IV, $(item)Madness$() IV or $(item)Overhead$() IV potion effects, or clear the player of any positive Potion Effects. $(br)When on low health, it may also apply $(item)Resizing$(/l) Potion Effect.$(br)Leonard will also periodically clear the battlefield of any $(l:)Liquid$(/l) or $(l:)Gas$(/l) Brews in a small radius around it.

When Leonard has less than half of its health, it will start summoning $(l:)Lost Souls$(/l). Each Lost Soul will last naturally for a short timespan, but as long as they exist, Leonard cannot be harmed.$(br)$(§2)Green Souls$() can be harmed by any means$(br)$(§c)Red Souls$() can only be harmed by $(item)Fire$(), while $(§1)Black Souls$() can only be harmed by Magic.
Last, Leonard is also capable of casting certain $(l:symbology/introduction)Spells$(/l) during the fight, such as Ignianima, Expelliarmus, Flipendo, Impedimenta and Confundus.
